transcript: Speaker A: Ek balloon kitne ka hai bhaiya? [How much is one balloon, brother?] Speaker B: Each balloon costs 20 rupees. Speaker A: Okay, 5 de dena. [Okay, give me 5.] Speaker B: Okay sure, that would be 100 rupees. Speaker A: Bhaiya aap to english bahut accha bol lete ho. [Brother, you speak English very well.] Speaker B: Haan aise hi bol kar practice karta hoon. [Yes, I practice by speaking like this.] Speaker A: Kahan se bolna seekha? YouTube dekhkar? [Where did you learn to speak? By watching YouTube?] Speaker B: Arey nahi, English bolne ke liye to practice chahiye... YouTube pe practice kaise karunga? [Oh no, to speak English you need practice... how will I practice on YouTube?] Speaker A: To phir kahan se seekhi? [Then where did you learn it from?] Speaker B: Wo ek app hai MySivi karke, wahan ek AI teacher hai, main usi ke sath practice karta hoon. [There is an app called MySivi, there is an AI teacher there, I practice with her.] Speaker A: Arey waah! [Oh wow!] Speaker B: Haan, mai bas 15 dino se practice kar raha hoon aur meri English bahut acchi ho gayi hai. [Yes, I've only been practicing for 15 days and my English has become very good.] Speaker A: Bahut accha, par ye app to mehanga hoga na? [Very good, but this app must be expensive, right?] Speaker B: Bilkul nahi, maine to sirf ek rupaye me hi shuru kiya tha. [Not at all, I started for just one rupee.] Speaker A: Waah, phir to saare logon ko ye app use karna chahiye. [Wow, then everyone should use this app.] Speaker C: Install now pe click karo aur MySivi app download karo. [Click on install now and download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: Ek balloon kitne [How much for one balloon] Each balloon costs 20 rupees. 5 de dena [Give me 5] Okay sure, 100 rupees english bahut [English very] bol lete ho [speak well] bol kar practice [practice by speaking] Kahan se bolna [Where to speak] seekha...youtube [learned...youtube] practice chahiye...youtube [need practice...youtube] kahan se seekhi [where did you learn] MySivi Wo ek app hai MySivi [There is an app MySivi] Arey waah [Oh wow] 15 DAYS mai bas 15 dino [I've only been 15 days] bahut aachi ho [become very good] app to mehanga [app must be expensive] MySivi Premium 3 days of Premium benefits for ’1 Autopay, cancel anytime. 1,200 learners purchased today 24/7 AI English Teacher 500+ Exercises and Lessons Unlimited Access phir to saare [then everyone] MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: An animated skit featuring a balloon seller who speaks fluent English thanks to the MySivi app. He explains to a young boy that he practices with an AI teacher on the app, which only costs 1 rupee for a 3-day trial. The ad ends with a call to action to install the app.
